title: ASR Outdoor Mosquito Net with Mounting Kit Travel Camping Essentials Outdoor
description:
Ensure a restful night’s sleep with ASR Outdoors fine mesh round mosquito net for camping, travel, backpacking and other outdoor activities! Keep mosquitoes and pesky bugs out of your sleeping area with this large mosquito indoor or outdoor canopy; measuring 131 inches in diameter, the mosquito net is suitable for most size beds and mattresses. Importantly, this fine mesh mosquito net in sheer white colorway features 240 holes per square inch, meaning mosquitoes and bugs are out, but that airflow and circulation can still travel within the mosquito netting. ASR Outdoor Mosquito Net with Mounting Kit Travel Camping Essentials Outdoor

Ensure a restful night’s sleep with ASR Outdoors fine mesh round mosquito net for camping, travel, backpacking and other outdoor activities! Keep mosquitoes and pesky bugs out of your sleeping area with this large mosquito indoor or outdoor canopy; measuring 131 inches in diameter, the mosquito net is suitable for most size beds and mattresses.

Importantly, this fine mesh mosquito net in sheer white colorway features 240 holes per square inch, meaning mosquitoes and bugs are out, but that airflow and circulation can still travel within the mosquito netting. The fine mesh material is made from durable polyester, holding up to lots of wear and tear on your travels, backcountry adventures, road trips and more.

Key Features

  • MOSQUITO NET: Round mosquito net feature 240 holes per square inch fine mesh that will keep bugs out but allow for air flow, circulation and a good nights sleep! The mosquito net comes with mounting kit and reusable zip lock bag for storage when not in use
  • TRAVEL ESSENTIALS: A must have item to include with you for travels where mosquitoes could pass on infection; lightweight design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more
  • CAMPING GEAR: Camping, backpacking, road tripping and more, pack this mosquito net to keep bugs out and ensure a restful and uninterrupted sleep; diameter is 131.5 inches, making the mosquito canopy or mosquito netting suitable for most bed sizes
  • MOUNTING KIT INCLUDED: Mosquito net mounting kit includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop; hand tools for installation not included
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Shape: Round; Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches; Weight: 0.85lbs; Color: White; Material: Polyester

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 0RROUMUG
  • UPC: 810131703035
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small

A must have item to include with you for travels abroad where mosquitoes could pass on infection, this lightweight mosquito canopy design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more. Plus, the mosquito net for bed comes with a mounting kit (hand tools not include), that includes the following: includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop.

Lastly, the mosquito net also comes with a reusable and resealable plastic storage zip lock bag for storage when not in use. Stay bug free and enjoy a peaceful, uninterrupted sleep with this camping essentials backpacking gear mosquito net from ASR Outdoor.

Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches
